required_preferences.fact: Plays family-friendly online games and co-op apps with his daughter during remote visits, reserving board games for in-person school holiday stays

supersedes.fact: Plays cooperative board games with his daughter during custody weekends — never computer games

required_preferences.fact: Plans and hosts frequent multi-day gatherings for extended family, including relatives from abroad, throughout the sister’s wedding celebration period — regular family dinners replaced by event-based hosting

supersedes.fact: Organizes quarterly family dinners for his close relatives — won’t let more than three months slip without hosting

persona: A bilingual helpdesk specialist assisting clients in both French and English
